titleStmt.title: SII 24.121: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 121. (A.R. No. 31 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a sale of land for a flower garden under orders of the Śrīkāryam officer Tiruvālanāṭṭu-Mānāḍuḍaiyār to Kōṭṭūr-uḍaiyāṉ Tiruvikramaṉ. Mentions the land endowed by Uḍaiyāṉ Vēḷāṉ Karuṇākaraṉ alias Toṇḍaimāṉār. The inscription is dated in the 15th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻappāmālai malainta parumaṇittiraḷ puyattirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppattaṉ varai mārvan tanatenap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutani Iruppak kalaimakaḷ
naḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppat ticaitoṟun tikiriyoṭu ceṅkolnaṭappa Akila puvaṉamu kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai mimicai niḻaṟṟak karuṅkali yoḷittu vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷat
micaiyeṟavum kaliṅkapūmiyaikkaṉaleriparukavum Aimpaṭaip vempaṭai tāṅki veṅ tāṅkinitiruntu vaṭaticai Aṭippaṭuttaruḷi ten ticai taru(ra)mamum tavamum tānamum(n) taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyum
talaittalai ciṟappa vantaruḷi vilakkarum poṟpuliyāṉai rcūṭa niṟaimaṇimakuṭam llām Iṉṉuyirt tāypol tannoḷi ciṟantu maṇ muḻutumaḷippa manuneṟi vaḷarttuttan koyi
voṭuṅka muraikkaṭaimuḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum menmeloṅka Ūḻi Ūḻi mā nilaṅkākka pattāṇṭil varumuṟai munne mannavar cumantu tiṟai niraittuc corinta cempoṟkuvaiyil tankula
Ampalañcūḻ tirumāḷikaiyum kopura vā varai Utaiya kuṉṟamoṭu niṉṟeṉap pacum pon meyttu pali vaḷarpiṭamum vicum poḷit
taḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippa periya tirunāḷ perumpeyar viḻāvenum ṭṭātiyil Ampalaniṟainta Aṟputakkūttar Iṉpar vāḻa Eḻunta ruḷa(na)ṟku ti(ti)rutter koyil cempon
ḷ muttin payilvaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭunter viti taṉ tiruvaḷarperāl(c) ceytu camaittaruḷi paimpoṟ kuvitta parikalamutalāl cempoṟkaṟpakattoṭu pariccinnamum Aḷavillātaṉa Oḷipeṟavamaittu pattāmā
ttiṅkaḷ Attampeṟṟa Ātittavārattu tiruveṇmatiyil tiraiyotaci tattu Innana palavum Initu camaittaruḷit taṉ Orukuṭaikiḻ la muḻutum kavippacceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaru ciṅkaḷarañci
kar tiṟaiyiṭak kaṉnaṭar venniṭak koṅkarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟet ticai mannarum tantamakkaraṇenat tirumalarccevvi muṟaimaiyiliṟaiñcit tollai Eḻulakum toḻuteḻat tonṟiya mullai vi
Umaiyoṭu caṅkarannimaiyatti porunti Uṭaniruppa Āṅkavan cūḻuṅkaṅkai yoppākiya terivaiyar tilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇa vanitai tirupuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷo
taruḷumuḻutuṭaiyāḷ tirumālakattup piriyātenṟum mātar maṭappiṭi mutalkkiḻa kaṟ(p)pakat taraṇimuḻutuṭaiyāḷivaḷenat tiruvuḷḷat taruḷum
cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecarivanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācani vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu
vār koyilukku śrīkāriyam ceykiṟa tiruvālanāṭṭu mānāṭuṭaiyār Evaṟpaṭi Āḻvār koyil riyam ceykiṟa parakesari tirunāṭuṭaiya nampiyum Irāyūr
nārāyaṇanampiyum vempaṟṟūr Aṇiyiraṅkanāṭum tirukkaṭavūr Arumārattiruk kaḻakaṇṭarum Ivai nārāyaṇa nampiyum perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Irāyūr vīṟṟiruntā nampiyum parakecaricceri śrīkārimāṟa nampiyum
śrīvayiṣṇavāriyam tirumaṅkai nampiyum perumpuliyūrc cakkarapāṇi nampiyum Ālaṅkuṭi tiruvāyppāṭi periyakoyil perumpuliyūrt tirup
Āritan puṇṭarīkan puṇṭarika nampiyum pāratāyan cirāman nampiyum pāratāyan
yil kaṇakku Ampala nāna tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭa rājentraciṅka koṭṭuruṭaiyān tiruvik kiraman
taṉakkut tiruppaḷḷittāmam cātti Aruḷukaikku Ivan ceyvitta tirunanta (na)vanaṅkaḷai tāṅki tirunantaṉa kku Icainta kīḻpāṟkellai Uṭaiyān veḷān karuṇākaranāna toṇṭaimānār ceyvi
kkum tenpāṟkellai rājanārāyaṇap pūntoṭṭattukku vaṭakkum miy pāṟkellai ka brahmadeyattu ccaruppetimaṅkalattu tirunantavanam An=ta nūṟṟu nāṟpatin
lai kāverikku teṟku perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Araikkā
ppuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukku Āḻvār tirumaṭai
kku meṟkum ten ṅkiviḷāka
vicainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa ṅkuḻi ppaṭṭatil
kācu 4 10 paṇṭā viḷākattukku puṉcey varicai paḷḷikkoṇṭān marakkālāl yāl vanta nel Aḷantu
kittirunantavānam ceyyum nellu kuṟuṇiyāka Āḷiraṇṭukku nellu patakku patinkalamum puṭavai
Irupati nel tukku nilam nimantamāka Ittiṇai tāṅkit tirunantavanamum tiṇaitāṅki ttu Ittiruppa śrīvayyiṣṇavar
nāna tirunaṟaiyūr dāsarum I maka ceyyak kaṭavā rākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu purattu
ttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṭattanāna tiruvaraṅkappiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kantāṭait tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paṭṭar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nārāyaṇa nampieḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai parakecaricceri nampieḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nālūr Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Ippaṭikku Ivai Āvaṅ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai 4 10 pūtittirumaṅkaiyāḻvān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nālūr Ippaṭikku Ivai perumpuliyūr cakkarapāṇi nampi Eḻuttu perumpu
Eḻuttu vaḻuti neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan cirākavan ciykārimāṟaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāratāyan cīriḷiṅko garuṭa vākana neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
ritan kurukaikāvalan Ippaṭikku Ivai ciykāriyañ ceykiṟa tiruvāli nāṭṭu maruttūruṭaiyār pukaḻaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 24.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
